nodes.itemHTML: • An Overview of Cryptography - By Gary C. Kessler.
• Biased Nonce Sense: Lattice Attacks against Weak ECDSA Signatures in Cryptocurrencies - Computing private keys by analyzing and exploiting biases in ECDSA nonces.
• Minerva: The curse of ECDSA nonces - Exploiting timing/bit-length leaks for recovering private keys from ECDSA signatures
• LadderLeak: Breaking ECDSA With Less Than One Bit Of Nonce Leakage - Breaking 160-bit curve ECDSA using less than one bit leakage.

• Recommendations for Discrete Logarithm-Based Cryptography: Elliptic Curve Domain Parameters (NIST SP 800-186) - Official NIST guide how securely implement elliptic curves. It also includes math shortcuts, optimizations and possible security risk of wrong algorithm implementation. (October 2019)
• themerafstars0 - Has decorators for username, last two directories in working directory path, git status, timestamp, last exit status and also name of active virtual environment.
• ParoaPestars0 - Based on lpha3chostars31
• lpha3chostars31 - Modified version of the intheloop theme for pentesters which includes the date, time, and IP address for pentest logging.
• JavaScript for Impatient Programmers (ES2022 edition) - Axel Rauschmayer (HTML)
• Xamarin.Forms Notes for professionals - Compiled from StackOverflow documentaion (PDF)
• Introduction to AVM and Applications - Introduction to the Algorand Virtual Machine architecture and Algorand Smart Contracts (aka Applications).

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Tools to convert from other package formats
nodes.itemHTML: • GMAppImagerstars3 - Graphically Converts GameMaker Studio 2 games to AppImage bundles.

• appenvstars0 - Small C++ library telling where the app data resides and where the user data is by using readlink("/proc/self/exe")), thus allowing C++ applications to become relocatable in the filesystem.
• gnome_appimage_installerstars1 - Somewhat a misnomer (AppImages don't need to be "installed"), creates a desktop file that follows the freedesktop.org spec for your AppImage files; written in bash.
• Cognitive Science and Science Education - American Psychologist, 1986. [All Versions]. Susan Carey's review on cognitive-science-based methodologies for science education.

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Tools to convert from other package formats
nodes.itemHTML: • Package-to-appimagestars1 - Tool for converting .deb and .rpm packages into AppImage format by using Docker.
• reboundstars3.9k - Fetch Stack Overflow results on compiler error.
• bcalstars565 - Byte CALculator for storage conversions and calculations.
• bitwisestars467 - Base conversion and bit manipulation.
• cgasmstars351 - x86 assembly documentation.
• add-gitignorestars547 - Interactively generate a .gitignore for your project based on your needs.
• is-up-clistars347 - Check if a domain is up.
• reachablestars18 - Check if a domain is up.
• loadteststars2.3k - Run load tests.
• diff2html-clistars390 - Create pretty HTML from diffs.
• caniuse-cmdstars1.6k - Search caniuse.com about browser support of features.
• surge - Publish static websites for free.
• ipfs-deploystars1.1k - Deploy static websites to IPFSstars21.3k.
• Dischargestars504 - Deploy static websites to Amazon S3.
• servestars8.2k - Serve static files (https, CORS, GZIP compression, etc).
• simplehttpstars51 - Easily serve a local directory over HTTP.
• shell2httpstars992 - Shell script based HTTP server.
• HTTPiestars24.1k - A user-friendly HTTP client.
• HTTP Promptstars8.6k - Interactive HTTP client featuring autocomplete and syntax highlighting.
• ainstars459 - HTTP client with a simple format to organize API endpoints.
• bitly-clientstars45 - Bitly client.
• imgur-uploader-clistars52 - Upload images to imgur.
• pageres-clistars1.6k - Capture website screenshots.
• How AI Built This
• AppImage-Integratorstars0 - A simple program to integrate AppImages into the Linux desktop written in Qt6.
• leapstars3 - Fast and simple AppImage manager. Written in Rust.
• lsdstars8.5k - ls with many extra features.
• dyffstars695 - YAML diff tool.
• gronstars11.4k - Make JSON greppable.
• STM32F4xx with Embedded Rust at the HAL A blog containing a series of tutorials demonstrating the use of several peripherals through simple examples leveraging the stm32f4xx-hal crate.
• React - 🛠 - 🐙stars196k - React components can be used on the client and server side.
